c_signature: int mpfr_set_z_2exp (mpfr_ptr f, mpz_srcptr z, mpfr_exp_t e, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
doc: BLOCKED -- needs mpz/bigint integration ADR (bd mpfr-ts-3a9). Sets f = z * 2^e, correctly rounded. The C signature takes mpz_srcptr; the natural TS surface is mpfr_set_z_2exp(z: bigint, e: bigint, prec: bigint, rnd: RoundingMode): Result. But the upstream API decision (do we expose _z variants at all, or does the user compose via mpfr_set_from_bigint + mpfr_mul_2si?) needs to land first. Same blocker family as mpfr_add_z. See bd mpfr-ts-3a9 for the full discussion. Unblock condition: ADR on mpz/bigint surface design.
refs: src/core.ts -- bigint is the natural TS analog of mpz_t.
